UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the system.

position.description: The user's position in the company.

department.description: The department the user belongs to.

photoUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a document uploaded or generated for a staff member.

staffName.description: Name of the staff member the document belongs to.

type.description: Type of the document (e.g., Contract, Payslip).

fileName.description: The name of the document file.

date.description: The date the document was created/uploaded.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information, keyed by user ID.

/documents/{documentId}.description: Stores documents associated with staff members.
